issues.message: article 100 bis does not sort after 100-B within the same base

known-stale citation to a target that does not exist in the current corpus: urn:lex-mx:federal:statute:lmv:article:16-bis-2 — Cites LMV's 1975-vintage 'Artículo 16 Bis' series (información privilegiada); the modern LMV, fully rewritten 2005-12-30, has no such articles. LSAR's article 68 was never updated when LMV was replaced.
